title: Question Ball
description: A question-comprehension game where kids answer who, what, where, and why prompts from picture clues.
learningGoals: Match oral questions to picture answers
Hear full-sentence models for why questions
interactionModel: choose-one tap the picture answer after a spoken wh-question
feedbackModel: Correct answers sparkle and speak praise; misses wiggle with a playful boing, get a spoken nudge, and replay the question.

modes.title: Catch the Question
modes.skill: who, what, and where question comprehension

modes.title: Why Questions
modes.skill: matching why questions to simple reasons

credits: Emoji placeholder scene and answer art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
